# HELP rsigma_detection_matches_by_rule_total Detection matches per rule.
# TYPE rsigma_detection_matches_by_rule_total counter
rsigma_detection_matches_by_rule_total{rule_title="Keep Rule",level="high"} 100
rsigma_detection_matches_by_rule_total{rule_title="Live Noisy",level="medium"} 50
rsigma_detection_matches_by_rule_total{rule_title="Dup Title",level="low"} 12
# HELP rsigma_correlation_matches_by_rule_total Correlation matches per rule.
# TYPE rsigma_correlation_matches_by_rule_total counter
rsigma_correlation_matches_by_rule_total{rule_title="Some Correlation",level="high",correlation_type="event_count"} 7
